title: Section 28
content: 1[28. Penalty for non-disclosure of the name of the manufacturer, etc.--Whoever contravenes the provisions of section 18A 2[or section 24] shall be punishable with imprisonment for a term which may extend to one year, or 3[with fine which shall not be less than twenty thousand rupees or with both].]
footnote: 1. Subs, by Act 13 of 1964, s. 19, for s. 28 (w.e.f. 15-9-1964). 2. Ins. by Act 68 of 1982, s. 23 (w.e.f. 1-2-1983). 3. Subs. by Act 26 of 2008, s. 8, for "with fine which may extend to one thousand rupees or with both" (w.e.f. 10-8-2009).
